subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and hath caused all things to speak in praise of the Dawning-Place of His Cause whereby they were made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الایات بالحق و انطق بها کل شیء بثناء مطلع امره الذی به ظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
